# .agent-org/provenance.md
# Generated by create-agent-organization. Do not edit manually.
# Records the source input and validation result for this organization.

created_at: "<ISO-8601 datetime>"           # e.g. 2026-06-12T14:30:00Z
created_by: create-agent-organization

source_input:
  type: "<enum>"                            # structured_handoff_package | free_form_plan
  path: "<string>"                          # path to the input file as provided by the user
  checksum: "<string>"                      # SHA-256 of the input file at time of consumption

schema:
  schema_version: "<string>"               # value of schema_version from the handoff package; omit if free_form
  readiness_derivation_rule: "<string>"    # value of readiness.derivation_rule; omit if free_form
  readiness_validated: "<bool>"            # true | false — whether readiness was re-derived and confirmed
  validation_mode: "<enum>"               # structured | free_form
  validation_result: "<enum>"             # passed | warning | failed
  validation_warnings: []                 # list of SCHEMA_INCOMPLETE_WARNING messages, if any
  validation_errors: []                   # list of SCHEMA_CONFLICT_ERROR or SCHEMA_INVALID_ERROR messages, if any

override:
  required: "<bool>"                       # true if Mode B (free_form) was used
  confirmed_by_user: "<bool>"              # true if user explicitly acknowledged the risk and skipped plan-formulation
